alkylation reagent: alkylated with 20 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min
cleavage agent: Then trypsin was added at 1:50 trypsin-to-protein mass ratio
collision energy: Peptides were selected for MS/MS using NCE setting as 33
enrichment method: incubated with pre-washed agarose-conjugated anti-acetyl-lysine antibody beads
instrument: analyzed by Q ExactiveTM Plus hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: treated with 10 mM DTT for 1 h at 37°C
